props.title: 谍影重重，中共为何能打入民运高层内部？｜民运｜唐元隽｜王书君｜间谍｜国安｜FBI｜策反｜中国民主党｜王局拍案20240904
props.description:
居住在纽约的中国海外民运人士唐元隽遭到FBI逮捕，纽约联邦检察院已对他提起刑事诉讼，指控他秘密为中国国家安全部工作。
作为海外民运的领袖，唐元隽为什么要为国安工作？他是从什么时候投共的？国安究竟用了怎样的手段？

#王志安 #民运 #唐元隽 #王书君 #间谍 #国安 #FBI #策反 #中国民主党

delta.insert:
#功能1
n=int(input("Enter the number of nodes: "))
print("Output the nodes")
for i in range(n):
    print(str(i), end=" ")
print()
edges=[["" for j in range(i+1,n)] for i in range(n-1)]
for i in range(n-1):
    for j in range(i+1,n):
        edges[i][j-i-1]=str(i) + "-" + str(j)
print("Output the edges")
for i in range(n-1):
    for j in range(i+1,n):
        print(edges[i][j-i-1], end=" ")
    print()

#功能2
m=int(input("Enter the number of nodes1: "))
n=int(input("Enter the number of nodes2: "))
print("Output the nodes")
for i in range(m):
    print(str(i), end=" ")
for i in range(n):
    print(str(i)+'*', end=" ")
print()
edges=[["" for j in range(n)] for i in range(m)]
for i in range(m):
    for j in range(n):
        edges[i][j]=str(i) + "-" + str(j)+'*'
print("Output the edges")
for i in range(m):
    for j in range(n):
        print(edges[i][j], end=" ")
    print()

#功能3
n=int(input("Enter the number of nodes: "))
k=n//2
print("Output the edges")
for i in range(k):
    l,r=i,i+k
    edges=["("+str(l)+","+str(r)+")"]
    for j in range(l+1,r):
        edges.append("("+str(l)+","+str(j)+")")
    for j in range(l):
        edges.append("("+str(r)+","+str(j)+")")
    for j in range(r+1,n):
        edges.append("("+str(r)+","+str(j)+")")
    for edge in edges:
        print(edge, end=" ")
    print()

#功能4
m=int(input("Enter the number of nodes1(默认m>n): "))
n=int(input("Enter the number of nodes2(默认m>n): "))
k=n//2
print("Output the edges")
for i in range(k):
    l,r=i,i+k
    edges=[]
    #(ai,bi),(ai,bk+i),(ak+i,bi)
    edges.append("("+str(l)+","+str(l)+"*)")
    edges.append("("+str(l)+","+str(r)+"*)")
    edges.append("("+str(r)+","+str(l)+"*)")
    # V1叶子连V2核心
    for j in range(l+1,r):
        edges.append("("+str(j)+","+str(l)+"*)") 
    for j in range(l):
        edges.append("("+str(j)+","+str(r)+"*)") 
    for j in range(r+1,m):                   
        edges.append("("+str(j)+","+str(r)+"*)")
    #V2叶子连V1核心
    for j in range(l+1,r):
        edges.append("("+str(j)+"*,"+str(l)+")") 
    for j in range(l):
        edges.append("("+str(j)+"*,"+str(r)+")") 
    for j in range(r+1,n):                      
        edges.append("("+str(j)+"*,"+str(r)+")")
    for edge in edges:
        print(edge, end=" ")
    print()

#功能1
n=int(input("Enter the number of nodes: "))
print("Output the nodes")
for i in range(n):
    print(str(i), end=" ")
print()
edges=[["" for j in range(i+1,n)] for i in range(n-1)]
for i in range(n-1):
    for j in range(i+1,n):
        edges[i][j-i-1]=str(i) + "-" + str(j)
print("Output the edges")
for i in range(n-1):
    for j in range(i+1,n):
        print(edges[i][j-i-1], end=" ")
    print()

#功能2
m=int(input("Enter the number of nodes1: "))
n=int(input("Enter the number of nodes2: "))
print("Output the nodes")
for i in range(m):
    print(str(i), end=" ")
for i in range(n):
    print(str(i)+'*', end=" ")
print()
edges=[["" for j in range(n)] for i in range(m)]
for i in range(m):
    for j in range(n):
        edges[i][j]=str(i) + "-" + str(j)+'*'
print("Output the edges")
for i in range(m):
    for j in range(n):
        print(edges[i][j], end=" ")
    print()

#功能3
n=int(input("Enter the number of nodes: "))
k=n//2
print("Output the edges")
for i in range(k):
    l,r=i,i+k
    edges=["("+str(l)+","+str(r)+")"]
    for j in range(l+1,r):
        edges.append("("+str(l)+","+str(j)+")")
    for j in range(l):
        edges.append("("+str(r)+","+str(j)+")")
    for j in range(r+1,n):
        edges.append("("+str(r)+","+str(j)+")")
    for edge in edges:
        print(edge, end=" ")
    print()

#功能4
m=int(input("Enter the number of nodes1(默认m>n): "))
n=int(input("Enter the number of nodes2(默认m>n): "))
k=n//2
print("Output the edges")
for i in range(k):
    l,r=i,i+k
    edges=[]
    #(ai,bi),(ai,bk+i),(ak+i,bi)
    edges.append("("+str(l)+","+str(l)+"*)")
    edges.append("("+str(l)+","+str(r)+"*)")
    edges.append("("+str(r)+","+str(l)+"*)")
    # V1叶子连V2核心
    for j in range(l+1,r):
        edges.append("("+str(j)+","+str(l)+"*)") 
    for j in range(l):
        edges.append("("+str(j)+","+str(r)+"*)") 
    for j in range(r+1,m):                   
        edges.append("("+str(j)+","+str(r)+"*)")
    #V2叶子连V1核心
    for j in range(l+1,r):
        edges.append("("+str(j)+"*,"+str(l)+")") 
    for j in range(l):
        edges.append("("+str(j)+"*,"+str(r)+")") 
    for j in range(r+1,n):                      
        edges.append("("+str(j)+"*,"+str(r)+")")
    for edge in edges:
        print(edge, end=" ")
    print()

#功能1
n=int(input("Enter the number of nodes: "))
print("Output the nodes")
for i in range(n):
    print(str(i), end=" ")
print()
edges=[["" for j in range(i+1,n)] for i in range(n-1)]
for i in range(n-1):
    for j in range(i+1,n):
        edges[i][j-i-1]=str(i) + "-" + str(j)
print("Output the edges")
for i in range(n-1):
    for j in range(i+1,n):
        print(edges[i][j-i-1], end=" ")
    print()

#功能2
m=int(input("Enter the number of nodes1: "))
n=int(input("Enter the number of nodes2: "))
print("Output the nodes")
for i in range(m):
    print(str(i), end=" ")
for i in range(n):
    print(str(i)+'*', end=" ")
print()
edges=[["" for j in range(n)] for i in range(m)]
for i in range(m):
    for j in range(n):
        edges[i][j]=str(i) + "-" + str(j)+'*'
print("Output the edges")
for i in range(m):
    for j in range(n):
        print(edges[i][j], end=" ")
    print()

#功能3
n=int(input("Enter the number of nodes: "))
k=n//2
print("Output the edges")
for i in range(k):
    l,r=i,i+k
    edges=["("+str(l)+","+str(r)+")"]
    for j in range(l+1,r):
        edges.append("("+str(l)+","+str(j)+")")
    for j in range(l):
        edges.append("("+str(r)+","+str(j)+")")
    for j in range(r+1,n):
        edges.append("("+str(r)+","+str(j)+")")
    for edge in edges:
        print(edge, end=" ")
    print()

#功能4
m=int(input("Enter the number of nodes1(默认m>n): "))
n=int(input("Enter the number of nodes2(默认m>n): "))
k=n//2
print("Output the edges")
for i in range(k):
    l,r=i,i+k
    edges=[]
    #(ai,bi),(ai,bk+i),(ak+i,bi)
    edges.append("("+str(l)+","+str(l)+"*)")
    edges.append("("+str(l)+","+str(r)+"*)")
    edges.append("("+str(r)+","+str(l)+"*)")
    # V1叶子连V2核心
    for j in range(l+1,r):
        edges.append("("+str(j)+","+str(l)+"*)") 
    for j in range(l):
        edges.append("("+str(j)+","+str(r)+"*)") 
    for j in range(r+1,m):                   
        edges.append("("+str(j)+","+str(r)+"*)")
    #V2叶子连V1核心
    for j in range(l+1,r):
        edges.append("("+str(j)+"*,"+str(l)+")") 
    for j in range(l):
        edges.append("("+str(j)+"*,"+str(r)+")") 
    for j in range(r+1,n):                      
        edges.append("("+str(j)+"*,"+str(r)+")")
    for edge in edges:
        print(edge, end=" ")
    print()
